title: Breath Crystals
description: Cold biomes cause players to exhale visible breath particles that crystallize and fall. The colder the biome, the more dramatic the frozen breath effect becomes.
body:
# ❄️ Breath Crystals

Experience the chill of winter! **Breath Crystals** brings cold biomes to life! Watch your breath crystallize in the cold air as you explore Minecraft's frozen wilderness.

## Features

- **Realistic Breath Effects**: See your character's breath as particles that drift and fade naturally
- **Dynamic Temperature Response**: Breath intensity varies based on biome temperature - from gentle wisps in snowy plains to thick clouds in frozen peaks
- **Immersive Biome Coverage**: Works in all cold environments including:
  - Snowy Plains & Tundra
  - Ice Spikes
  - Frozen Oceans & Deep Cold Oceans
  - Frozen Peaks
- **Performance Optimized**: Lightweight design with efficient biome detection and staggered particle generation
- **Zero Gameplay Impact**: Pure visual enhancement that doesn't affect mechanics or survival

Perfect for players seeking atmospheric immersion without intrusive effects. Feel the bite of winter as you traverse frozen landscapes!
